mainEntity.name: What is the due date for ROC annual filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: AOC-4 is due within 30 days of AGM. MGT-7 is due within 60 days of AGM. AGM must be held within 6 months of financial year end (i.e., by 30 September for March year-end companies). DIR-3 KYC is due annually by 30 September.

mainEntity.name: How much does annual ROC compliance cost in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our annual compliance packages cover all mandatory filings (AOC-4, MGT-7, DIR-3 KYC, ADT-1), Board/AGM minutes, and year-round compliance monitoring. Contact +91-77000 89597 for a fixed-fee quote based on your company's size and complexity.

mainEntity.name: My company has not filed ROC returns for 2 years. Can you help?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We handle compliance backlog clearance including filing all overdue forms, calculating and paying additional fees, and applying for condonation of delay if the company faces strike-off proceedings under Section 248.
